name: times infinity
short_description: A very off-kilter adventure game about university life with light shooting and platforming.
detailed_description:
A very off-kilter adventure game about university life with light shooting and platforming.

The initial scenario is as follows, you play as Para, an up and coming freshman at the Tiffson Institute, all seems to be going well as the semester begins until you get an odd task from a mysterious creature. Asking you to take all of your dorm-mates out for a meal, and failing this "test" will lead to your demise. With no other choices in tow you push forward to pass this test... Little does Para know, things continue to spiral from here.

Special Controls (Defaults):

Q & E : Swaps outfits

G : For special actions (i.e. showing fortunes)

Right Click (Right Mouse Button) : Enters First Person Mode

Left Click (Left Mouse Button) : Interacts with objects ( Third Person Mode Only )

Left Click (Left Mouse) : Fires your weapon ( First Person Mode Only )

Spacebar : Jumps, or Advances a text box

Enter / Return : Skips dialog events
